Spherical Patch Dashboard - Any Number of Poles

Enter 3 or more poles. This version uses automatic Delaunay triangulation so interior points can participate in the mesh.
Geometry changes require clicking Update geometry.
These controls affect only the visualization and update immediately.
Box 1
Each box footprint is a quadrilateral defined by 4 plan points, extruded vertically by height H. The graphs update only when you click Update boxes.
Column 1
Each cylindrical column is defined by center point (x, y), height H, and radius R. The graphs update only when you click Update columns.
